practice.name: Problem 10 (2017 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: The lines with equations $ax - 2y = c$ and $2x + by = -c$ are perpendicular and intersect at $(1, -5)$. What is $c$?

practice.name: Problem 2 (1999 AIME)
practice.statement: Consider the parallelogram with vertices $(10, 45)$, $(10, 114)$, $(28, 153)$, and $(28, 84)$. A line through the origin cuts this figure into two congruent polygons. The slope of the line is $m/n$, where $m$ and $n$ are relatively prime positive integers. Find $m + n$.

practice.name: Problem 14 (2009 AMC 12A)
practice.statement: A triangle has vertices $(0, 0)$, $(1, 1)$, and $(6, k)$, and the line $y = mx$ divides the triangle into two triangles of equal area. What is the sum of all possible values of $m$?
